about.title: Get to Know Me
about.subtitle: Learn more about my background, experience and what drives my passion for technology.
about.story: I am Chad Feierstein, a 26-year-old {role} and {admin} from {location}. With an education as a Computer Science Technician and a BTS in {cloud}, I bring over {experience}. From frontend and backend to server management and modern technologies, I master complex challenges while constantly learning new things.

services.title: What I Offer
services.subtitle: From concept to implementation: I develop customized solutions for your digital requirements.

webdev.title: Web Development
webdev.description: Modern, responsive websites with proven and new technologies, both frontend and backend. From PHP, JavaScript and CSS to Nuxt 4, Tailwind and the latest web standards.

cloud.title: Virtualization
cloud.description: Professional virtualization solutions for efficient and flexible IT infrastructures. Setup of development environments, server virtualization and performance optimization.

itadmin.title: IT Administration
itadmin.description: Comprehensive system administration and network management for reliable infrastructure. With solid knowledge in operating systems, server management and network technologies.

featured.title: Featured Project
featured.subtitle: Discover my latest innovation, where cutting-edge AI meets intuitive design.
featured.description: An advanced AI Chat Bot that conducts intelligent conversations and handles complex queries. This project combines cutting-edge AI technology with an elegant, user-friendly interface, providing a seamless experience for natural conversations. The bot leverages powerful language models through OpenRouter.ai, supports multiple AI models, and intelligently adapts to various conversation contexts. With real-time responses, markdown support, and thoughtful dark/light mode integration, this chat bot is a perfect example of modern full-stack development.

header.title: About Me
header.subtitle: Get to know the person behind the code, my background, skills and passions.

story.intro: I am Chad Feierstein, a {age}-year-old {role} and {admin} from {location}. My focus is on {cloud}, from developing {webapps} to professional {servers}. Throughout my {positions}, I have gained hands-on experience across various IT domains, including ERP systems, database management, and web programming. My foundation consists of an IT Technician diploma (DAP) and a Higher Technical Degree (BTS) in Cloud Computing. Thanks to my {langCount}, I communicate effortlessly in international teams.

interests.title: Interests & Hobbies
interests.subtitle: What excites me in my free time

passion.title: Passion for Technology
passion.description: Web development and server administration aren't just my profession, they're my passion. There's hardly anything more satisfying than mastering a complex challenge while creating elegant, efficient solutions. Whether it's building a modern web application from scratch, optimizing server infrastructure, or exploring new technologies: I love learning daily and continuously developing my skills.

hobbies.title: Hobbies and Interests
hobbies.description: Away from the digital world, I enjoy precious moments with my family, which includes our three furry companions. Regular meetings with friends and occasional gaming sessions provide the perfect balance to my technology-driven everyday life. I'm particularly passionate about electronic music and love attending festivals like Tomorrowland, Parookaville, or Luxembourg Open Air with friends and family.

certifications.title: Certifications
certifications.subtitle: Professional certifications and qualifications that demonstrate my expertise in various technology areas

cta.title: Let's Connect
cta.subtitle: Have questions or interested in connecting? I'd love to hear from you.

cert1.title: General Aptitude Test
cert1.description: State eligibility test for the public sector in Luxembourg. This examination confirms suitability for administrative positions in public administration and is a prerequisite for applying to government positions.

cert2.title: Cisco Certified CyberOps Associate
cert2.description: Professional certification in Cybersecurity Operations. Validates comprehensive knowledge in monitoring, detecting and responding to security incidents, as well as analyzing security threats in networks.

cert3.title: Cisco Certified Network Associate 3
cert3.description: Advanced CCNA certification focusing on Enterprise Networks. Covers advanced routing protocols, network security, Quality of Service, and modern network automation technologies.

cert4.title: Cisco Certified Network Associate 2
cert4.description: Intermediate CCNA level focusing on Switching and Routing. Covers VLANs, Inter-VLAN routing, dynamic routing, WLAN concepts, and fundamental network security.

cert5.title: Cisco Certified Network Associate 1
cert5.description: Foundation certification in networking technology. Provides essential knowledge about network models, IP addressing, Ethernet, and basic switch and router configuration.

cert6.title: Microsoft Office Specialist 2016
cert6.description: Official Microsoft certification for professional Office skills. Validates advanced capabilities in PowerPoint, Word, Excel, and Outlook for efficient business communication and document creation.

item1.title: Web Developer at Mullerpneus
item1.description: Development and maintenance of the internal ERP system and online shop. Responsible for new features, bug fixing, databases and server-side configurations.
item1.task1: Feature Development: Planning and implementation of new ERP and shop features
item1.task2: Maintenance: Error analysis, debugging and performance optimization
item1.task3: Databases: Administration, maintenance and optimization of MySQL databases
item1.task4: Server: Configuration of FTP, SFTP, email, websockets and PHP versions
item1.task5: Monitoring: Log analysis and proactive troubleshooting

item2.title: IT Cloud Engineer Internship
item2.description: 12-week internship at QPark Consulting focusing on cloud technologies and agile project methods. Work on two major cloud projects with AWS and GCP.
item2.task2: Virtual machine configuration on Google Cloud Platform
item2.task4: Static website deployment on AWS S3
item2.task5: REST API integration and data processing
item2.task6: Cloud cost optimization and best practices

item3.title: IT Technician Summer Job
item3.description: 8-week summer position at Lycée Guillaume Kroll in the IT department. Focus on network infrastructure and telephone system management.
item3.task1: Setup and management of MIXvoip phones
item3.task2: Installation of new telephone connections in server room
item3.task3: Patch panel documentation updates in Excel

item4.title: IT Technician Project Completion
item4.description: 4-week summer job to complete a website project started during the internship. Focus on backend development and SAML integration.

item5.title: IT Technician Main Internship
item5.description: 6-week internship at Lycée Guillaume Kroll focusing on web development and database design. Development of a complete website solution.

item6.title: IT Network Technician Internship
item6.description: 6-week internship at STEP Syndicat intercommunal in Peppange. Introduction to network technology and infrastructure management in a sewage treatment plant.
item6.task3: Creation of new patch panel plans

cardanoDbSyncSetup.title: Linux - Cardano DB Sync Installation
cardanoDbSyncSetup.description: Complete guide for installing Cardano DB Sync on Debian 12 with PostgreSQL database and NIX package manager, including service configuration

notes.title: Important Notes
notes.subtitle: Please note these important points before setup
notes.cardanoNode: A running Cardano Node is required for DB Sync
notes.diskSpace: At least 700GB free disk space (Cardano Node: 203GB, DB Sync: 10GB, PostgreSQL: 438GB)
notes.ramRequirement: At least 48GB RAM (Cardano Node: 24GB, DB Sync: 21GB, System: 3GB)
notes.syncTime: Initial synchronization can take several days
notes.rootAccess: Root access or sudo permission required

completion.title: Cardano DB Sync Installation Complete!
completion.message: Your Cardano DB Sync is now running and synchronizing blockchain data to the PostgreSQL database. Monitor logs and synchronization progress regularly.

footer.description: Full-Stack Developer & IT Technician from Luxembourg

intro.title: Introduction
intro.content: Protecting your personal data is important to me. This privacy policy informs you about how I process your data on this website and what rights you have.

dataCollection.title: Data Collection on This Website
dataCollection.content: This website was developed with a focus on privacy:

items.noTracking: No user tracking or behavior analysis
items.noAnalytics: No Google Analytics or similar services

technicalStorage.title: Technically Necessary Storage
technicalStorage.content: For the functionality of the website, the following data is stored locally in your browser:

localStorage.title: Theme Preference
localStorage.description: Your preferred color setting (light/dark mode) is stored locally in your browser. This data is not transmitted to servers and is used solely for the correct display of the website.

turnstile.title: Cloudflare Turnstile (Bot Protection)
turnstile.description: The contact form uses Cloudflare Turnstile for protection against automated requests. This is technically necessary for website security.

contactForm.title: Contact Form
contactForm.content: When you use the contact form, the following data is processed:
contactForm.legalBasis: Legal basis: Art. 6(1)(b) GDPR (contract initiation) and Art. 6(1)(f) GDPR (legitimate interest in responding to inquiries). The data is used exclusively to process your request.

resend.title: Email Delivery via Resend
resend.description: For email delivery from the contact form, we use Resend (Resend, Inc., USA). Your entered data (name, email, message) is transmitted to Resend for delivery. Resend is certified under the EU-US Data Privacy Framework.

hosting.title: Hosting
hosting.content: This website is hosted on Cloudflare Pages. Cloudflare may process technical data such as IP addresses required for website delivery. Cloudflare is certified under the EU-US Data Privacy Framework.

rights.title: Your Rights & Data Control
rights.intro: Since this website only processes minimal data, you have the following practical options:
rights.localStorage: Theme preference: This is only stored locally in your browser. You can delete it yourself at any time (Browser settings → Clear site data) or configure your browser to clear localStorage when closing.
rights.contact: Contact form: If you have sent me a message and wish it to be deleted, simply contact me. The email will then be deleted from my inbox.

noCookieBanner.title: Why No Cookie Banner?
noCookieBanner.content: This website does not use tracking cookies or marketing tools. The only local storage (theme preference) is technically necessary and does not require explicit consent under EU law.
